fidelity_notes: Emulator supports BOTH cookie-session (sessionID) and Bearer, with logout at POST /aml/auth/logout AND RESTful DELETE /aml/users/login, clearing the session cookie — closer to the real contract than the review assumed. Session-expiry, MFA, max-sessions, and default-password states remain unmodeled (roadmap Phase 5); certify the exact logout path/verb against a capture.
